subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! Thy letter hath reached the court of the Wronged One, and the servant in attendance hath made known that which was inscribed therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی کتابت در ساحت مظلوم حاضر و عبد حاضر آنچه در او مسطور بود معروض
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @love of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
